metadata.title: Day Planner OG
metadata.description: A plugin to help you plan your day and setup pomodoro timers; fork of the original plugin by James Lynch (which stopped at 0.5.8) which preserves the look/feel and behavior of the original.

regex.source: name:"Add a Day Planner template for today to the current note"
regex.target: name:"将今天的日程计划模板添加到当前笔记中"

regex.source: name:"Link today's Day Planner to the current note"
regex.target: name:"将今天的日程安排链接到当前笔记"

regex.source: name:"Unlink today's Day Planner from its note"
regex.target: name:"将今天的日程安排从笔记中删除"

regex.source: .setDesc("The plugin will automatically mark checkboxes for tasks and breaks in the past as complete (x)")
regex.target: .setDesc("该插件将自动将过去的任务和中断的复选框标记为已完成（x）")

regex.source: .setDesc("The plugin will automatically mark the textbox for the current item as in progress (/)")
regex.target: .setDesc("插件会自动将当前项目的文本框标记为正在进行中（/）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Display a circular progress bar in the status bar")
regex.target: .setDesc("在状态栏中显示圆形进度条")

regex.source: .setDesc("Display now and next tasks in the status bar")
regex.target: .setDesc("在状态栏中显示现在和下一个任务")

regex.source: .setDesc("Display a notification when a new task is started")
.setDesc("The zoom level to display the timeline. The higher the number, the more vertical space each task will take up.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示时间线的缩放级别。数字越大，每个任务占用的垂直空间就越大。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The icon of the timeline pane. Reopen timeline pane or restart obsidian to see the change.")
regex.target: .setDesc("时间线窗格的图标。重新打开时间线窗格或重新启动黑曜石以查看更改。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Gradient colors for the timeline (line, begin, end, hover begin, hover end, reset).")
regex.target: .setDesc("时间线的渐变颜色（线条、开始、结束、悬停开始、悬停结束、重置）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use this heading text to mark the beginning of the Day Planner.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用此标题文本标记Day Planner的开始。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use this label to mark break between tasks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用此标签标记任务之间的中断。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use this label to mark the end of all tasks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用此标签标记所有任务的结束。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Replace BREAK and END task text in your planner with the configured label text (consistency)")
regex.target: .setDesc("用配置的标签文本替换计划中的BREAK和END任务文本（一致性）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Preserve these values in the schedule, for example '-' for canceled, or '>' for rescheduled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在计划中保留这些值，例如“-”表示取消，“>”表示重新安排。")

regex.source: .appendText("Choose between 3 modes to use the Day Planner plugin:")
regex.target: .appendText("在三种模式中选择使用Day Planner插件：")

regex.source: .appendText("Plugin automatically generates day planner notes for each day within a Day Planners folder.")
regex.target: .appendText("插件在day Planners文件夹中自动为每天生成日程安排笔记。")

regex.source: .appendText("Command used to insert a Day Planner for today within the current note.")
regex.target: .appendText("用于在当前笔记中插入今天的日程计划的命令。")
name:`将当前设备“${this.device}”设置为写入器`

regex.source: .appendText("Plugin automatically links to the current daily note. Daily notes plugin must be enabled.")
regex.target: .appendText("动链接到当前的每日笔记。必须启用每日笔记插件。")
name:"将当前设备设置为写入器"

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide tasks with these values from the timeline view, for example '-' for canceled, or '>' for rescheduled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从时间线视图中隐藏具有这些值的任务，例如“-”表示取消，“>”表示重新安排。")

regex.source: Error("No point in running bezier with only one color.")
regex.target: Error("只使用一种颜色运行bezier是没有意义的。")

regex.source: Error("Logarithmic scales are only possible for values > 0")
regex.target: Error("对数刻度仅适用于大于0的值")
